tasks.title: Create agent_service
tasks.description: Create backend/app/services/agent_service.py with functions: create_agent(db, user_id, name) validates max 3/user and creates Agent with idle status + elo 1000, get_agents(db, user_id), get_agent_history(db, user_id, agent_id, limit, offset) returns paginated sessions with stats, update_agent_stats(db, agent_id, won, hands, profit), set_status(db, agent_id, status), increment_timeout(db, agent_id), reset_timeouts(db, agent_id).
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: create_agent enforces MAX_AGENTS_PER_USER=3
AC-2: get_agent_history returns sessions with rival info and stats
AC-3: set_status updates agent status field
AC-4: increment_timeout increments consecutive_timeouts
GATE: agent_service imports without errors

tasks.title: Create agent API endpoints + poker_skill.md
tasks.description: Create backend/app/api/agent.py with endpoints: POST /agent/create, GET /agent/list, GET /agent/history, GET /session/{id}/log, GET /poker-skill (public, serves poker_skill.md). Create poker_skill.md in project root with complete self-contained documentation: auth, rules, endpoints, examples.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: POST /agent/create validates auth and max 3 agents
AC-2: GET /agent/list returns agents with stats
AC-3: GET /agent/history returns paginated sessions
AC-4: GET /session/{id}/log returns complete hand log
AC-5: GET /poker-skill serves markdown file (public)
AC-6: poker_skill.md contains complete onboarding guide
GATE: All endpoints appear in /docs

tasks.title: Simplify auth and update arenas
tasks.description: Modify backend/app/api/auth.py: remove onboarding endpoint and bot_service import. Remove OnboardingRequest from schemas. Modify backend/app/api/arenas.py: replace Bot references with Agent, use agent_id instead of bot_id in queue endpoint, remove active_version_id check.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: auth.py has no onboarding endpoint
AC-2: auth.py has no bot_service import
AC-3: arenas.py uses Agent model instead of Bot
AC-4: Queue endpoint accepts agent_id
GATE: auth and arenas import without errors

tasks.title: Update sessions and leaderboard for agents
tasks.description: Modify backend/app/api/sessions.py: replace all Bot/BotVersion references with Agent. Use agent_id instead of bot_id. Remove BotVersion lookups. Modify backend/app/api/leaderboard.py: /bots endpoint becomes /agents, query Agent table instead of Bot.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: sessions.py uses Agent instead of Bot/BotVersion
AC-2: leaderboard /bots becomes /agents endpoint
AC-3: No remaining Bot imports in either file
GATE: Both files import without errors

tasks.title: Delete dead files and update main.py
tasks.description: Delete: backend/app/api/bots.py, backend/app/api/matches.py, backend/app/services/bot_service.py. Update backend/app/main.py: remove bots and matches router imports, add agent router. Remove feedback_service import from sessions if present.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: bots.py, matches.py, bot_service.py deleted
AC-2: main.py imports agent router instead of bots/matches
AC-3: No remaining dead imports in main.py
GATE: python -c 'from app.main import app' succeeds
